package.name: soccer_strategy
package.description: L4 strategy for MiniBot (blueprint §6): a per-robot Behavior Tree (BehaviorTree.CPP, Groot2-debuggable) plus a decentralized role auction — no master. Each robot bids on roles (cost = distance to ball), independently computes the same assignment, and re-bids automatically if a teammate drops. Roles are XML trees loaded at launch (striker/supporter/goalie).
